hooks.command: cd /Users/arleyfernandez/projects/context && jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; ruff check --select E,F,W --fix "$f" 2>&1 | head -20; } 2>/dev/null || true
echo 'Migration edited — remember to test the downgrade path: alembic downgrade -1 && alembic upgrade head'
cd /Users/arleyfernandez/projects/context && jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; ruff check --select E,F,W --fix "$f" 2>&1 | head -20; } 2>/dev/null || true

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'alembic downgrade' && printf '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "WARNING: alembic downgrade modifies the database schema. Confirm this is intentional before proceeding."}' || true

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(docker[[:space:]]+.*[[:space:]]+rm|drop[[:space:]]+(table|database)|truncate[[:space:]])' && printf '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "WARNING: Destructive database operation detected. Please confirm explicitly."}' || true
